title: Junior Business Development Manager at Nexus Select Trust

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Nexus Select Trust
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Select Trust, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
